overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza known as Memorial Park, featuring massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air between high-rise buildings. The scene transitions from an elevated walkway to an open plaza dominated by the Militech corporate tower, with pedestrians walking through the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated memorial park walkway with integrated water features

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved elevated walkway, approaching the holographic orange fish display ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and white jacket walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: curved elevated pedestrian path with smooth white surface and integrated lighting
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the walkway
massive glowing orange holographic fish swimming in the air above the plaza
narrow water channel with greenery running beneath the elevated walkway
tall building with golden-yellow facade and multiple balconies on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated walkway in Memorial Park, with the camera moving forward along a curved path. A massive orange holographic koi fish swims in the distance above a water feature, while pedestrians walk ahead. The gold-facaded building becomes visible on the left as the walkway progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic aquatic displays

events.description: large blue holographic koi fish enters the scene from the left, swimming alongside the gold building
camera turns left to track the blue holographic fish as it swims past the vertical gardens

agents.ego_description: turning to follow the blue holographic fish while continuing to walk forward through the plaza

entered.detail: massive glowing blue holographic fish with flowing fins swimming through the air
greenery and plants growing on the balconies of the gold building facade
tall dark corporate building with MILITECH signage visible at the top

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves through the plaza, a blue holographic koi fish emerges from the left and swims alongside the gold building. The camera turns to follow this new element, revealing the Militech tower in the distance ahead. The orange fish moves to the right background while the environment opens up to expose more of the sky.

events.description: orange holographic koi fish returns to center view, swimming across the plaza from right to left
camera pans slightly to follow the orange fish as it swims toward the Militech building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while observing both holographic fish swimming overhead and approaching the Militech tower

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the Militech building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large digital screens displaying advertisements on the right side buildings

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic fish swims back into prominence as the camera approaches the Militech tower. The blue fish exits the frame while the plaza opens up to reveal the corporate entrance. Pedestrians are seen walking toward the building as the camera continues forward through the paved plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza at base of Militech headquarters

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of the Militech tower against the overcast sky
blue holographic koi fish reappears from the left, swimming around the upper floors of the Militech building

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the towering Militech building while observing both holographic fish swimming around the skyscraper

notable_agents.action: pedestrians in dark clothing walking past the camera toward the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the base of the Militech tower, tilting upward to emphasize its height against the narrow gap of sky between buildings. Both holographic koi fish now swim around the tower's facade—one orange and one blue—creating a striking visual against the dark corporate architecture. Pedestrians continue walking through the plaza as the camera pans to take in the scale of the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a curved elevated walkway into a vast corporate plaza dominated by a towering skyscraper. It begins by gliding forward along the walkway toward a distant orange holographic koi fish, with a gold-facaded building gradually appearing on the left. As the camera enters the open plaza, the view shifts to follow a blue holographic koi emerging from the left, which reveals the Militech tower ahead while the orange fish drifts into the background. The scene then expands as the blue fish exits the frame and the orange one returns to prominence, guiding the camera across the paved plaza toward the corporate entrance. Finally, the camera arrives at the base of the Militech tower and tilts upward, capturing both the orange and blue koi swimming around the dark architecture against a narrow strip of sky.
